title: Giant Foil Number 7 Balloon - 86 cm - Matte Baby Pink
features: 1 Matte Baby Pink Number 7 Foil Balloon
Number balloon measures 86 cm when fully inflated (ships flat)
Can be filled with helium or air via hand pump, and is self-sealing
Ideal for a 7th birthday party, or combined with other number balloons for any age
Combine with other baby pink party supplies from Unique Party
description: From the manufacturer Giant Matte Pink 34" Foil Number Balloons Make no mistake where the celebrations begin with these Giant Matte Pink Foil Number Balloons! These balloons are ideal to show off your birthday age, anniversary year or new year in eye catching fashion and fit any party with a pink motif! Don't forget the balloon weights and ribbon! product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Warning: Choking Hazard. Not suitable for children under 3 years due to small parts. Warning: Do not use near overhead powerlines or during thunderstorms.
